case_title: BLANCO, JAVIER vs. LEE, CHARLES IND & AS PARTNER DBA SLIDERS DINER et al

docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $494.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE SEP-09-1993,

AND FOR COST PURSUANT TO A MEMORANDUM OF COST FILED BY COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF.
